description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The upper section features three open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decor, or other items, while the lower section is enclosed with horizontal slats, likely concealing a storage compartment or drawer. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The back and sides are solid panels, with no visible openings or glass. The overall construction suggests it is both functional and aesthetically suited for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A tall, modern wooden cabinet with open shelves above and a slatted, enclosed compartment below, standing on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and a slatted lower compartment.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and solid wood panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid wood back panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with solid wood panels.
